title: Senior Doctor - Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Boehringer Ingelheim India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!
